channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Works signage not removed, 8th May
item.description:
This has been reported and investigated as closed Ref 9409615. The attached photos was taken today, they are still there ? Its a green verg on New Kent Road and Ash Avenue opposite Sainsburys

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several bikes blocking and cluttering the pavement, 8th May
item.description:
Several Voi bikes have been blocking and cluttering the pavement on Ordnance Hill for about a week or more now. Reported to Voi on Monday. The bikes are still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Ordnance Hill, St. John's Wood, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 4 graffitis on the bridge walls, 8th May
item.description:
4 graffitis on the bridge walls

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Way, Charlton

item.title: Dead cat black colour full size adult, 8th May
item.description:
Dead cat black colour just before wellington street at the junction right before the traffic light
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Street, Woolwich

item.title: Beds, sofas and general rat infestation, 7th May
item.description:
All sorts dumped and no one seems to get sorting

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Heavy tiles left on narrow pavement outside 20 Merton Road EN2., 7th May
item.description:
Heavy tiles have been left on a narrow pavement. A hazard to pedestrians.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merton Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Antisemitic graffiti, 7th May
item.description:
Between the junction & the bridge on the raised section of pavement. No wonder Jews are suffering stabbing & arson attacks with this sort of vile graffiti being added to our streets by the ignorant plebs of Hackney. It’s highly offensive & inappropriate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush overgrowing into public pathway pruning needed., 7th May
item.description:
Garden team maintenance. Overgrown Bush public pathway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Corsley Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass and litter, 7th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2 Aurora Point, Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London

item.title: New street light is not working during the night, 7th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechfield Road, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Thurlow Park Road SE21 8JL in front of houses 91/ 93, 7th May
item.description:
Thurlow Park Road SE21 8JL in front of houses 91/ 93 / 95 is a white painted concrete front wall at the front of the property which is graffiti tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture and Google Streetview link: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.43934,-0.0989693,3a,75y,345.18h,92.69t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sW0_bIa61-h68Db1M6AVszA!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D-2.6857280337412703%26panoid%3DW0_bIa61-h68Db1M6AVszA%26yaw%3D345.1767533830225!7i16384!8i8192?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDUwMi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thurlow Park Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture left on pavement, fly tipped, 7th May
item.description:

item.title: Streatham High Rd SW16 1PN number 63 Streatham, 7th May
item.description:
Streatham High Rd SW16 1PN number 63 Streatham Library stone frontage towards Pinfold Road corner Streatham High Road graffiti filth tagged – Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Streatham High Road, Streatham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
